mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.instance_id, t.node_id, t.node_log_id, t.task_type, t.assignee_type, t.assignee_ids, t.assignee_expression, t.title, t.description, t.content, t.status, t.action, t.result, t.comment, t.timeout_minutes, t.timeout_action, t.delegated_to, t.delegated_at, t.due_at, t.started_at, t.completed_at, t.created_at, d.name AS workflow_name, i.workflow_id FROM human_task t LEFT JOIN workflow_instance i ON t.instance_id = i.id LEFT JOIN workflow_definition d ON i.workflow_id = d.id WHERE t.id = #{id}

SELECT t.id, t.instance_id, t.node_id, t.node_log_id, t.task_type, t.assignee_type, t.assignee_ids, t.assignee_expression, t.title, t.description, t.content, t.status, t.action, t.result, t.comment, t.timeout_minutes, t.timeout_action, t.delegated_to, t.delegated_at, t.due_at, t.started_at, t.completed_at, t.created_at, d.name AS workflow_name, i.workflow_id FROM human_task t LEFT JOIN workflow_instance i ON t.instance_id = i.id LEFT JOIN workflow_definition d ON i.workflow_id = d.id WHERE t.status = #{status} AND ( t.assignee_type = 'user' AND JSON_CONTAINS(t.assignee_ids, CAST(#{userId} AS CHAR)) OR t.delegated_to = #{userId} ) ORDER BY t.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO human_task (instance_id, node_id, node_log_id, task_type, assignee_type, assignee_ids, assignee_expression, title, description, content, status, timeout_minutes, timeout_action, due_at, created_at) VALUES (#{instanceId}, #{nodeId}, #{nodeLogId}, #{taskType}, #{assigneeType}, #{assigneeIds}, #{assigneeExpression}, #{title}, #{description}, #{content}, #{status}, #{timeoutMinutes}, #{timeoutAction}, #{dueAt}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE human_task SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
